summary_en: 1,200,000 shares (3.36% of issued S/O), ¥410.4M ceiling, ToSTNeT-3 single-day execution on May 15, 2026 at 08:45 JST, reference price ¥342/share on May 14, 2026 benchmark.
title_en: Notice on Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Aida Sekkei Co., Ltd. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board has authorized acquisition of up to 1,200,000 treasury shares (3.36% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥410.4 million. The purchase will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on May 15, 2026 at 08:45 JST, using the May 14 reference price of ¥342 per share as the ceiling. The order is limited to that single trading session only; partial or full non-execution is possible depending on market conditions and order matching. Results will be announced immediately after trading closes. The rationale cited is to improve capital efficiency, enable flexible capital policy execution, and support shareholder returns.
